# 🎨 Design & UX

> Product design, UX research, brand, and visual craft.

**12 agents** · [← Back to all categories](../../README.md)

<!-- This file is generated by scripts/build-index.mjs. Do not edit by hand. -->

| Agent | What it does | Model | Tags |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`brand-guardian`](brand-guardian.md) | Develops and protects brand identity — voice, visual language, and the rules that keep it coherent across every touchpoint. | 🟡 sonnet | brand-identity, brand-guidelines, voice-tone, visual-identity |
| [`design-critique`](design-critique.md) | Delivers rigorous, specific, actionable critique of a design — evaluating it against usability heuristics, visual craft, accessibility, and goals. | 🔴 opus | design-review, critique, heuristic-evaluation, usability |
| [`design-system-architect`](design-system-architect.md) | Builds and governs design systems at scale — design tokens, component libraries, patterns, and the documentation and rules that keep them consistent across teams and platforms. | 🟡 sonnet | design-systems, design-tokens, component-library, theming |
| [`image-prompt-engineer`](image-prompt-engineer.md) | Crafts precise, well-structured prompts for AI image generators (Midjourney, DALL·E, Stable Diffusion, Imagen, Firefly) that translate a creative brief into reliable output. | 🟢 haiku | prompt-engineering, image-generation, midjourney, creative-brief |
| [`inclusive-design-specialist`](inclusive-design-specialist.md) | Ensures designs are accessible, inclusive, and barrier-free across abilities, cultures, and contexts — meeting WCAG and designing for the full range of human diversity. | 🟡 sonnet | accessibility, wcag, inclusive-design, a11y |
| [`interaction-designer`](interaction-designer.md) | Designs how an interface behaves over time — motion, transitions, gestures, feedback, and state changes that feel responsive and right. | 🟡 sonnet | interaction-design, motion, transitions, animation |
| [`ui-designer`](ui-designer.md) | Designs the visual layer of an interface — layout, components, type, color, and spacing — into pixel-precise, consistent, accessible screens. | 🟡 sonnet | ui-design, visual-design, components, design-tokens |
| [`ux-architect`](ux-architect.md) | Owns the structural layer of a product: information architecture, navigation, user flows, and interaction foundations — the skeleton the visual design hangs on. | 🟡 sonnet | information-architecture, user-flows, navigation, interaction-design |
| [`ux-copywriter`](ux-copywriter.md) | Writes the words inside the product — microcopy, labels, buttons, errors, empty states, and onboarding — in a consistent, clear product voice. | 🟡 sonnet | ux-writing, microcopy, content-design, voice-tone |
| [`ux-researcher`](ux-researcher.md) | Plans and runs user research and usability testing, then turns raw observation into decision-ready insight. | 🟡 sonnet | user-research, usability-testing, interviews, synthesis |
| [`visual-storyteller`](visual-storyteller.md) | Turns complex information into clear, compelling visual narratives — presentation decks, data stories, explainer diagrams, and pitch flows. | 🟡 sonnet | storytelling, presentations, data-visualization, narrative |
| [`whimsy-injector`](whimsy-injector.md) | Adds delight, personality, and memorable micro-interactions to an interface — purposefully, never at the expense of usability. | 🟡 sonnet | microinteractions, delight, animation, personality |
